name: G-10 index generation: --check-index-stale rejects with exit 2 when --index-path is not supplied
command: mkdir -p tree && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runner.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --check-index-stale 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q -- '--check-index-stale requires --index-path' err.txt && echo path_required 1>&2
